description: Goal2DreamerWrapper environment config — aux-decoder APs from latent RSSM.
_latent_mode_note: h_only (paper-faithful): aux decoder receives cat(h, zeros) so only the continuous deterministic h_t drives threshold predicates. Set to 'feat' for full cat(h,z) — better AP accuracy but z is categorical.

hazard_dist.head: nearest_hazard_distance
hazard_dist.comment: signed dist = decoder_output - hazard_safe_dist  (>0 clear, <0 inside hazard)

goal_dist.head: goal_distance
goal_dist.comment: signed dist = decoder_output - goal_reach_radius  (<0 inside goal, triggers reward)

near_obstacle.head: nearest_vase_distance
near_obstacle.comment: signed dist = decoder_output - obstacle_safe_dist  (>0 clear, <0 too close)

near_human.head: human_distance
near_human.comment: signed proximity = human_near_threshold - decoder_output  (>0 human nearby)

ap_thresholds._sources: see comments — values taken directly from SafeWorld-Benchmark-main training code
ap_thresholds._hazard_note: task.hazards.size read at runtime by ap_extractors.py:52; SafetyPointGoal2 default is 0.20
ap_thresholds._goal_note: task.goal.size from env; SafetyPointGoal2 default is 0.30
ap_thresholds._obstacle_note: near_obs_threshold from ap_extractors.py:71 — hardcoded 0.30 for all E2 task configs
ap_thresholds._human_note: near_human was a PLACEHOLDER in training (returns None); no ground-truth threshold exists. Human pos=[0,2], adjust this value to your use case
ap_thresholds._velocity_note: fast_threshold for E2 point-agent tasks (ap_extractors.py:65, level1.py:31, level2.py:31)

obs_normalisation.comment: ckpt_0500000.pt has no obs_mean/obs_std keys — disabled. Set enabled=true and add obs_mean/obs_std arrays here if you normalise inputs at inference time.

button_zones.comment: Set enabled=true and adjust positions to activate CarryingTracker
